name: policy-authoring
description: Reusable policy and requirements authoring skills for building, editing, auditing, rendering, and delivering UC/PR/FN/sub-function and PG/PI policy specs — now 10 skills including a first-contact intake router (classify new/revise/external-HTML and hand off), preview render/deliver splice, NC-studio upload gates (requirement links, decision-spec axes), HTML↔JSON pre-flight consistency check & conditional reconcile, and workflow orchestration (phase sequencing across the pipeline).

interface.longDescription: Ten reusable skills for policy and requirements authoring: first-contact intake router (classify new-from-source / revise-from-HTML / revise-spec and hand off), hierarchy decomposition, naming readability, policy-detail authoring (with an opt-in general-policy inference axis, always badged), integrity audit (groups A–L), new-module setup, preview render & delivery splice, NC-studio upload gates (G2 requirement links, G5 decision-spec axes), HTML↔JSON pre-flight consistency check with human-confirmed conditional reconcile, and workflow orchestration (phase sequencing across the pipeline). The bundled Python tools use a canonical spec JSON and a multi-unit policy_config.json so the workflow can move across project folders and source formats.
defaultPrompt: Use Policy Authoring to set up a new policy module.
Audit this policy spec for ID integrity.
Rewrite these policy details with tables and review flags.
